10537204.title: Written In Blood
10537204.description: Crime novelist Simon Toyne examines some of the darkest real-life crime stories. He investigates the similarities between the works of famous writers and the grim realities of true crime.

10538158.title: Judge Judy
10538158.description: A couple sue for the return of a security deposit and storage fees.

10538257.title: Cheaters
10538257.description: Chaz worries that wife Brandy's newly divorced friend will bring out the party girl in her. Luke's partner complains that he does not give her enough space.

10539205.title: World's Most Evil Killers
10539205.description: Exploring the life and crimes of American serial killer William `Bill' Suff.

10540133.title: Judge Judy
10540133.description: A teen and her girlfriend accuse her mother of assault and throwing away their belongings. Then, a couple sue their former roommates for the return of a security deposit.

10540218.title: Judge Judy
10540218.description: One couple accuse another of trashing their rental home and skipping out on rent and bills. Then, a woman says she never agreed to repay her mother for bail money and a man says his friend allowed his teen to drive his car, and he totaled it.

10541091.title: Judge Judy
10541091.description: Divorcees fight over reports to Child Protection Services and a tax return. Then, a former couple sue each other for belongings, loans and unpaid bills and a 3-year-old is accused of crashing a car.

10541143.title: Something's Killing Me
10541143.description: Paul and Alison Frase were told their child's disorder had no treatment and no cure. Scientists tell them their one hope depends on finding a dog and the right genetic code - the search begins.

10542082.title: Operation Repo
10542082.description: Viewers get to ride along with a team of highly-trained professionals from California's San Fernando Valley as they repossess cars ... no matter how angry the owners may get. The stories depicted are based on real events.

10542183.title: Operation Repo
10542183.description: Viewers get to ride along with a team of highly-trained professionals from California's San Fernando Valley as they repossess cars ... no matter how angry the owners may get. The stories depicted are based on real events.

10542248.title: Judge Judy
10542248.description: A pit-bull attack survivor sues for medical bills, lost wages and bicycle damages. Then, a landlord and a former tenant sue each other over eviction and a lost cash-for-keys deal.

10604846.title: Judge Judy
10604846.description: A Canadian woman sues her ex-boyfriend for repayment of a loan. Then, cousins fight over a borrowed car that was returned damaged.

10604946.title: Judge Judy
10604946.description: A plaintiff accuses a former friend of negligence in the death of a dog she was boarding. Then, a woman sues her ex-lover for wrecking her car.

10605325.title: Judge Judy
10605325.description: After winning custody of his children, a man denies owing his own mother for attorney fees. Then, a motorist accused of leaving the scene of an accident admits she had no driver's licence or insurance.

10605423.title: Extreme Salvage Squad
10605423.description: The concrete houseboat has collapsed, spilling trash everywhere. This forces the crew to split up into teams to complete the clean-up.

10605863.title: Uncovering Melanie's Murderer
10605863.description: A study in modern crime solving techniques, used in the search for the 1984 killer of teenage Melanie. It demonstrates how traditional investigative techniques are enhanced by DNA profiling. Including interviews with the original investigation team.

10606551.title: My Paranormal Nightmare
10606551.description: A brother and sister believe they have been chased by a shadow figure. Plus, a family report ghostly whispers and mournful serenades in their new home.

10606753.title: Doctor in the House
10606753.description: The doctor is called in to help 48-year-old Priti, a working mother who is struggling with multiple problems including stress, headaches, weight gain and disrupted sleep.

10607172.title: Auction Kings
10607172.description: Buyers in the Atlanta area searching for those one-of-a-kind items - a vampire hunting kit, anyone? - know exactly where to go, but the quantity is always limited and the prices fluid. `Auction Kings' follows the action at Gallery 63, a storied auction house in Hotlanta with a reputation for selling both bizarre and high-end items. Its owner, Paul Brown, manages his feisty staff and mingles with his customers, bidders and buyers who come from all walks of life.

10607249.title: Auction Kings
10607249.description: Buyers in the Atlanta area searching for those one-of-a-kind items - a vampire hunting kit, anyone? - know exactly where to go, but the quantity is always limited and the prices fluid. `Auction Kings' follows the action at Gallery 63, a storied auction house in Hotlanta with a reputation for selling both bizarre and high-end items. Its owner, Paul Brown, manages his feisty staff and mingles with his customers, bidders and buyers who come from all walks of life.

10607583.title: Extreme Salvage Squad
10607583.description: The concrete houseboat has collapsed, spilling trash everywhere. This forces the crew to split up into teams to complete the clean-up.

10608029.title: Celebrity Damage Control
10608029.description: Tom Cruise's all-American persona takes a massive hit after the public learns of his love for Scientology, leaving fans to wonder if he's really the man they thought he was.

10608222.title: Judge Judy
10608222.description: A teen says her friend offered to take care of her after she received a large settlement from a car crash. A newlywed says she had an allergic reaction to her stolen wedding-dress and sues the dressmaker for emotional distress.

10608546.title: Judge Judy
10608546.description: A young renter says his retainer was damaged when his landlady threw his property off a balcony. A schoolmate's grandmother accuses an 11-year-old of breaking the rear window of her car.

10608657.title: Judge Judy
10608657.description: A woman sues her child's father for his share of the boy's orthodontist bill. A woman says she never asked to be bailed out of jail, so she does not owe her former friend for her loan.

10608748.title: Judge Judy
10608748.description: A woman states that her neighbour vandalised her car after she complained to the cops about his loud partying.

10609090.title: Judge Judy
10609090.description: A woman accuses her ex-boyfriend of endangering her children and stealing money from her. A woman says her ex-roommate vandalised her home, but he says her children caused the damage.

10609185.title: Judge Judy
10609185.description: A puppy's owner says two small dogs attacked him. A fight over a boy turns ugly and leaves girls feuding over accusations of vandalism to a car.

10609255.title: Operation Repo
10609255.description: Language difficulties complicate a tense repo when the team tries to seize a tourist bus. Plus, when a knucklehead attacks Matt will pepper spray be applied to the situation?

10609617.title: Operation Repo
10609617.description: Matt and Froy trick some trusting kids into giving up the keys to their Porsche. Plus, a repo hits a wall when Sonyah finds the van they're after has already been seized by cops.

10609699.title: Operation Repo
10609699.description: Viewers get to ride along with a team of highly-trained professionals from California's San Fernando Valley as they repossess cars ... no matter how angry the owners may get. The stories depicted are based on real events.

10610083.title: Operation Repo
10610083.description: Viewers get to ride along with a team of highly-trained professionals from California's San Fernando Valley as they repossess cars ... no matter how angry the owners may get. The stories depicted are based on real events.

10610168.title: Uncovering Melanie's Murderer
10610168.description: A study in modern crime solving techniques, used in the search for the 1984 killer of teenage Melanie. It demonstrates how traditional investigative techniques are enhanced by DNA profiling. Including interviews with the original investigation team.

10610627.title: Celebrity Damage Control
10610627.description: Tom Cruise's all-American persona takes a massive hit after the public learns of his love for Scientology, leaving fans to wonder if he's really the man they thought he was.

10611094.title: Extreme Salvage Squad
10611094.description: The concrete houseboat has collapsed, spilling trash everywhere. This forces the crew to split up into teams to complete the clean-up.

10611448.title: My Paranormal Nightmare
10611448.description: A brother and sister believe they have been chased by a shadow figure. Plus, a family report ghostly whispers and mournful serenades in their new home.

10611631.title: Cheaters
10611631.description: The Cheaters team goes undercover to find out whether Eric is cheating on girlfriend Paige. Caught with his trousers down on camera, Eric is sent packing by a furious Paige.

10612020.title: Cheaters
10612020.description: Pablo's wife has noticed he is turning his back on family life. Cheaters' undercover investigators discover he is acting unfaithfully.

10612473.title: Crimes That Shook Australia
10612473.description: The story of John Bunting and a trio of his associates who splattered the south Australian district of Adelaide blood-red with 12 horrific slayings in the 1990s.
